creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
While you are working on those ports,  could you try to remove the dependency on:

lang/python metaport from:

- french/aster
- misc/pylize
- multimedia/py-mlt
- sysutils/azure-agent
- www/chromium
- www/iridium
- www/mod_spdy

lang/python2 metaport from:

- textproc/doclifter
